eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Clark; Nye; Lincoln; Esmeralda; Churchill; Douglas; Humboldt; Lyon; Lander; Mineral; Storey; Pershing; Eureka; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City; Elko, NV; at 11:02 AM on APR 18, 2019 Effective until 11:02 AM APR 20, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THIS IS THE NEVADA DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY THE LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE HAS REQUESTED THE ACTIVATION OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR AN AMBER ALERT PLEASE BE ON THE LOOKOUT FOR A WHITE 2013 BMW 528I SEDAN WITH NEVADA LICENSE PLATES OF MARIMAR THE VICTIMS NAME IS ALORA DANIELLE BENITEZ AND SHE IS A 15 YEAR OLD HISPANIC FEMALE WEIGHING 100 POUNDS AND IS 5 FEET 0 INCHES TALL WITH BROWN HAIR BROWN EYES WITH AN UNKNOWN CLOTHING DESCRIPTION SUSPECT 1 IS ROMAN CERRATOS A 39 YEAR OLD HISPANIC MALE WEIGHING 210 POUNDS IS 6 FEET 1 INCH TALL IS BALD WITH BROWN EYES SUSPECT NUMBER 2 IS MARICELA MERCADO A 40 YEAR OLD HISPANIC FEMALE WEIGHING 130 POUNDS IS 5 FEET 3 INCHES TALL WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES THE CHILD WAS LAST SEEN IN TORRENCE CALIFORNIA AT 9AM TODAY THE SUSPECTS ARE WANTED FOR A MURDER AND ARE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS IF THE VICTIM SUSPECT OR SUSPECT VEHICLE IS SEEN PLEASE DO NOT TAKE INDEPENDENT ACTION AND CALL 9 1 1 

ANYONE WITH INFORMATION ABOUT THIS INCIDENT IS ENCOURAGED TO CONTACT THE LA COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE HOMICIDE BUREAU AT 323 890 5500
